mapper.select: SELECT role_cd, role_nm, role_desc, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_role WHERE role_cd = #{roleCd} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_role (role_cd, role_nm, role_desc, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{roleCd}, #{roleNm}, #{roleDesc}, #{useYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_role SET role_nm = #{roleNm}, role_desc = #{roleDesc}, use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE role_cd = #{roleCd}
mapper.delete: UPDATE tb_role SET use_yn = 'N', upd_dt = NOW() WHERE role_cd = #{roleCd}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_role WHERE 1=1
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
